zh.Lichfield, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾利費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Broughton於1560年出生在英國斯塔福爾隆格頓時，他的父親Richard Broughton30歲，母親Eleanor Ruggeley30歲。他於大約1583年與Anne Dixwell在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1592年10月27日在他的家鄉享年32歲。

zh-hans.Lichfield, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾利費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Broughton于1560年出生在英国斯塔福爾隆格頓时，他的父亲Richard Broughton30岁，母亲Eleanor Ruggeley30岁。他于大约1583年与Anne Dixwell在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1592年10月27日在他的家乡享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Broughton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in all parts of England called Broughton. The first element is variously Old English brōc ‘brook’, burg ‘fortress’, or beorg ‘hill, mound’; the second is in all cases Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Braughton
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Broughton  .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Broughton was born in 1560, in Longdon, Staffordshire, England, his father, Richard Broughton, was 30 and his mother, Eleanor Ruggeley, was 30. He married Anne Dixwell about 1583, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 27 October 1592, in his hometown, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Broughton est né en 1560, à Longdon, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Broughton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Ruggeley, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Anne Dixwell environ 1583, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 27 octobre 1592, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Broughton 1560 in Longdon, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Broughton 30 und seine Mutter Eleanor Ruggeley 30. Er hat um 1583 in England Anne Dixwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Oktober 1592 im Alter von 32 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Broughton è nato il nel 1560 nel Longdon, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Broughton, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Ruggeley, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Anne Dixwell circa 1583, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 27 ottobre 1592, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Broughtonが1560年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアロングドンで生まれた時，父Richard Broughtonは30歳，母Eleanor Ruggeleyは30歳であった。約1583年にイギリスでAnne Dixwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1592年10月27日に故郷で32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Broughton(이)가 1560년 영국 스태퍼드실르 론그던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Broughton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Ruggeley(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1583년 영국에서 Anne Dixwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1592년 10월 27일 그의 고향에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Broughton nasceu em 1560, em Longdon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Broughton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Ruggeley, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Dixwell aproximadamente 1583, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de outubro de 1592, em sua cidade natal, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Broughton родился в 1560 г. в местности лонгдон, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Broughton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Ruggeley, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Dixwell около 1583 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 27 октября 1592 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Broughton nació en 1560, en Longdon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Broughton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Eleanor Ruggeley, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Anne Dixwell aproximadamente 1583, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 27 de octubre de 1592, en su pueblo, a la edad de 32 años.
